heading: Innovate at the Core
title: NFRAC Laboratory
desc: Join the autonomous core of NFRAC. Contribute to fundamental research and development across VPLD, AIRD, CSRD, and GPLD to build the tools and frameworks that power our ecosystem.

heading: Mentor Future Talent
title: ITTacademy
desc: Dedicated to the Training & Education wing. Lead instruction in programming languages and core computer science fundamentals to prepare the next generation of engineers.

heading: Architect Infrastructure
title: Antar Core
desc: Join the central engineering backbone. Build, maintain, and optimize the proprietary infrastructure and internal tools that power the distribution and operations of all other divisions.

heading: Strategize for Growth
title: MCG
desc: Drive technical strategy and high-level client engagement. Bridge the gap between complex business challenges and engineering excellence in our independent consulting wing.
